name: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.<field>.byteLength
title: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.<field>.byteLength
description: Byte length of a protocol field. The selector is read only.
If <protocol> or <field> is not contained in the packet, the selector returns 0. ethernetPacket::protocol::field::IsAvailable can be used to find out if the field is available.
return: Byte length of a protocol field.
